display.purpose: Page identity: sala name, login title. One instance per screen.

headline.purpose: Turn-level headings (Mattino / Sera). One or two per section.

title.purpose: Panel h3 headers. Internal workspace label.

body.purpose: Field values, labels, prose. 65ch max for guide text.

label.purpose: Uppercase section dividers within panels. Not for page-level eyebrows.

data.purpose: Monetary values and KPI numbers. Always tabular-nums.

shadows.name: ambient-panel
shadows.purpose: The base shadow. Applied to panels, cards, statusbar, login box. Never varied or escalated.

shadows.name: popup
shadows.purpose: Dropdown menus and fixed-position popups (action menus, tooltips). More pronounced than ambient-panel to lift the overlay clearly above the panel layer.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: Border color, box-shadow, background for input focus and button hover states.

motion.name: toast-in
motion.purpose: Toast appear: fade in + translateY(-10px) to 0. Only choreographed motion in the system.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Status bar comparison cluster wraps to full width.

breakpoints.name: tablet
breakpoints.purpose: Entry grid and table auxiliary columns collapse.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action: save turn, confirm form. Blu Operativo fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 18px; border: 1px solid #3b5bdb; background: #3b5bdb; color: #fff; transition: filter .12s; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { filter: brightness(.95); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px #e9edfd; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: .5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action: date nav, topbar controls. White fill, ink text.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 18px; border: 1px solid #d3d9e6; background: #ffffff; color: #1d2733; transition: filter .12s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { filter: brightness(.97); background: #f6f8fc; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: #3b5bdb; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px #e9edfd; } .ds-btn-ghost:disabled { opacity: .5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Numeric Input
components.description: Currency/numeric entry field. Right-aligned, fixed 110px width.
components.css: .ds-input-number { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; padding: 8px 10px; border: 1px solid #d3d9e6; border-radius: 8px; background: #ffffff; color: #1d2733; width: 110px; text-align: right; transition: border-color .12s, box-shadow .12s; } .ds-input-number:focus { outline: none; border-color: #3b5bdb; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px #e9edfd; } .ds-input-number:disabled { background: #eef2f8; color: #69748a; }

components.name: Panel / Card
components.description: Primary data-entry and display workspace. White surface, ambient shadow.
components.html:
◈ Contanti

Inserisci i tagli di banconote e monete ricevute durante il turno.
components.css: .ds-panel { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e4e8f0; border-radius: 14px; padding: 16px 18px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(20,30,55,.05), 0 2px 8px rgba(20,30,55,.05); } .ds-panel-title { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; margin: 0 0 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; color: #1d2733; } .ds-panel-ic { color: #3b5bdb; } .ds-panel-body { font-size: 14px; color: #69748a; margin: 0; line-height: 1.5; }

components.name: Mini Metric Card
components.description: Compact read-only calculated output (Cassetto, Versamento, Scostamento). --surface-2 background signals computed, not entered.
components.css: .ds-mini { background: #f6f8fc; border-radius: 10px; padding: 10px 12px; } .ds-mini-l { font-size: 12px; color: #69748a; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-mini-v { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; color: #1d2733; margin-top: 2px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-mini.ds-mini-err .ds-mini-v { color: #cf3535; } .ds-mini.ds-mini-err { background: #fbe9e9; }

components.name: Status Bar (Ok)
components.description: Primary operator communication. Shows reconciliation state. One of three states: ok / warn / bad.
components.html:
€ 0,10
Scostamento — in quadratura
components.css: .ds-statusbar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; padding: 18px 22px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(20,30,55,.05), 0 2px 8px rgba(20,30,55,.05); } .ds-sb-ico { width: 46px; height: 46px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; color: #fff; } .ds-sb-big { font-size: 21px; font-weight: 700; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; line-height: 1.15; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-sb-sub { font-size: 13px; color: #69748a; } .ds-statusbar-ok { background: #e6f6ec; border-color: #bfe6cd; } .ds-statusbar-ok .ds-sb-ico { background: #15924f; } .ds-statusbar-ok .ds-sb-big { color: #0f6b3a; }

components.name: Badge
components.description: Open/closed day status indicator. Two states: open (green) and closed (muted).
components.css: .ds-badge { padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; display: inline-block; } .ds-badge-open { background: #e6f6ec; color: #15924f; } .ds-badge-closed { background: #eef2f8; color: #69748a; }

components.name: Nav Link (active)
components.description: Top navigation link. Active state uses Blu Operativo text + 2px bottom border only — no fill.
components.html: DashboardCassaTicket
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 2px; background: #ffffff; border-bottom: 1px solid #e4e8f0; padding: 0 16px; } .ds-nav-link { color: #69748a; padding: 14px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; text-decoration: none; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; transition: color .1s; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #1d2733; } .ds-nav-active { color: #3b5bdb; border-bottom-color: #3b5bdb; }

components.name: Turn Tab
components.description: Mattino / Sera switcher. Color (amber vs blue) identifies active turn before the operator reads the label.
components.css: .ds-tabs { display: inline-flex; background: #eef2f8; border: 1px solid #e4e8f0; border-radius: 12px; padding: 5px; gap: 5px; } .ds-tab { border: 0; background: transparent; color: #69748a; font-weight: 600; padding: 9px 18px; border-radius: 9px; cursor: pointer; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; line-height: 1.15; min-width: 120px; font-size: 14px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-tab small { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; color: #98a2b3; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .4px; } .ds-tab-active { background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(20,30,55,.05), 0 2px 8px rgba(20,30,55,.05); } .ds-tab-active.ds-tab-matt { color: #a96a09; } .ds-tab-active.ds-tab-matt small { color: #a96a09; } .ds-tab-active.ds-tab-sera { color: #3b5bdb; } .ds-tab-active.ds-tab-sera small { color: #3b5bdb; }

components.name: Avatar (deterministic)
components.description: User/person initial avatar. Color family chosen via crc32(name) % 6 — consistent per entity across sessions.
components.html:
M
F
L
P
G
A
components.css: .ds-ava { width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 50%; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 800; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; user-select: none; } .ds-ava-c0 { background: #e9edfd; color: #26368f; } .ds-ava-c1 { background: #e6f6ec; color: #0f6b3a; } .ds-ava-c2 { background: #fdf2dd; color: #8a5708; } .ds-ava-c3 { background: #f0ecfd; color: #4a2380; } .ds-ava-c4 { background: #e8f8f9; color: #0a6b7c; } .ds-ava-c5 { background: #fce8f3; color: #8c1a5f; }

components.name: Toast (Success)
components.description: Save-success feedback. The only choreographed motion in the system. Auto-dismisses after ~3s.
components.css: .ds-toast { position: fixed; top: 18px; right: 18px; z-index: 60; background: #15924f; color: #fff; padding: 13px 18px 13px 16px; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(20,30,55,.18); font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; animation: ds-toast-in .35s ease both; } @keyframes ds-toast-in { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-10px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-toast { animation: none; } } .ds-toast-ico { width: 22px; height: 22px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(255,255,255,.25); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 13px; flex-shrink: 0; }

narrative.overview:
The visual system is built on earned trust through daily repetition. An operator opens this interface at 6 AM, again at 2 PM, and again at midnight — same layout, same color vocabulary, same status signals. The interface earns credibility by never surprising the person using it. Every session starts the same way. Every shift ends the same way. The UI disappears into the task.

This system explicitly rejects the ERP gestionale aesthetic — dense rows of same-weight text, no visual hierarchy, form controls that look and feel like 2005 software. It equally refuses the SaaS dashboard trap: metric-hero widgets, heavy accent saturation, motion that exists to impress rather than inform.

What remains is a clean, tactile operational surface. A single cobalt accent used sparingly as a reference signal. Semantic colors (green, amber, red) that carry the entire state vocabulary without ambiguity. Surface layering that establishes hierarchy without relying on shadow drama.
keyCharacteristics: Numeric clarity above all: tabular-nums everywhere money appears
State speaks before style: the statusbar (ok/warn/bad) is the primary UI element
Tonal layering for depth: hierarchy through surface steps, not shadow escalation
One operational accent used only for actions, selection, and focus
Touch-aware density: 44px minimum targets, compact panels

rules.name: The State Vocabulary Rule
rules.body: Green, amber, and red are reserved for reconciliation state, status indicators, and feedback — never decoration. Each semantic color is always deployed as a trio: foreground + *-bg + *-border.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Blu Operativo (#3b5bdb) covers ≤10% of any given screen surface. Reserve it strictly for: primary action buttons, active navigation underlines, focus rings, active tab labels, and text links.

rules.name: The Avatar Palette Rule
rules.body: Avatar colors (ava-purple, ava-teal, ava-rose, plus accent, green, amber families) are assigned deterministically via crc32(name) % 6. Never assign manually. Never use semantic colors (status-ok, status-bad) for avatars.

rules.name: The Tabular Numbers Rule
rules.body: Every monetary value, count, percentage, or quantity uses font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums without exception.

rules.name: The Scale Ceiling Rule
rules.body: No heading on this interface exceeds 26px. Typographic scale is a function of information hierarchy, not visual impact.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Elements at the same depth level differentiate themselves through surface color steps, not shadow variations. Shadow exclusively signals a depth-level change.

rules.name: The Two Shadow Rule
rules.body: The system has two shadow tokens: --sh (ambient-panel, very low opacity) for structural elements, and --sh-popup for fixed-position dropdown menus and overlays. Never add a third; never escalate --sh on hover.

dos: Do use font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums on every monetary value, count, or metric.
Do deploy semantic colors as a trio: foreground + *-bg + *-border.
Do keep Blu Operativo (#3b5bdb) off inactive states and decorative elements.
Do use 44px minimum height for all interactive elements.
Do maintain the three-level surface stack: page → panel → sub-panel metric.
Do keep the statusbar sticky — operators need reconciliation state visible while scrolling.
Do apply text-wrap: balance on h2–h3 headings.
Do assign avatar colors via crc32(name) % 6 for deterministic, consistent identity.
donts: Don't reproduce the ERP/gestionale aesthetic: no equal-weight text, no zero-whitespace density.
Don't add decorative motion. Motion is reserved for state transitions only.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't apply a semantic color to components that don't carry state meaning.
Don't introduce a second accent hue.
Don't build metric/KPI hero layouts with big number + small label + gradient accent.
Don't display monetary values without tabular-nums.
Don't put muted or faint text on semantic tinted backgrounds.
Don't use status-ok/warn/bad colors for avatar backgrounds — use the ava-* palette instead.
